title: ExtractionManifest
description: Manifest written by setup-ddl at extraction time. Downstream tools read this to auto-select dialect and delimiter instead of hardcoding tsql.

technology.description: Source technology that produced this DDL extraction.

dialect.description: sqlglot dialect for parsing the extracted DDL files.

source_database.description: Name of the source database (or service name for Oracle).

extracted_schemas.description: List of schemas included in the extraction.

source_host.description: Hostname or IP of the source SQL Server / Fabric Warehouse. Used for cross-server staleness detection.

source_port.description: Port of the source SQL Server / Fabric Warehouse. Used for cross-server staleness detection.

source_dsn.description: ORACLE_DSN connection string for Oracle extractions. Used as an opaque identity for cross-server staleness detection.
